creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dear maintainer of FreeBSD port www/opera, can you please check

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=109427

and give us your opinion on this problem?

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

You have acquired a scroll entitled 'irk gleknow mizk' (n).
This is an IBM Manual scroll.
You are permanently confused.
